title: Loading Dialog
description: Displays a modal dialog with a progress indicator and optional actions. Use it to inform users about the status of long-running operations and optionally provide a cancel or confirm action.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-loading-dialog with determinate progress

sections.title: Indeterminate Mode
sections.description: Shows a loading dialog with indeterminate progress (spinner) for operations where progress cannot be measured

sections.title: Multiple Buttons
sections.description: Demonstrates a loading dialog with multiple action buttons (Pause, Cancel, Continue) for complex workflows

sections.title: Button States
sections.description: Shows different button states including disabled, loading, and enabled buttons with various colors and looks

sections.title: Progress Colors
sections.description: Demonstrates how progress colors change dynamically during different phases of an operation

sections.title: Dynamic Updates
sections.description: Comprehensive example showing all dynamic update methods including restart functionality

sections.title: No Buttons
sections.description: Shows a loading dialog without any action buttons, useful for non-interruptible operations

sections.title: Long Text Handling
sections.description: Demonstrates how the component handles very long titles and text content with proper wrapping

sections.title: Accessibility
sections.description: Shows keyboard navigation, hotkeys, and focus management features for accessibility compliance

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Closes the loading dialog.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The dialog is closed and control returns to the caller.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Sets the displayed progress text inside the dialog.
 *
 * @param text The text to display under the progress bar.
 * @returns void
 */
setProgressText(text: string): void

/**
 * Sets the status text, typically representing the current step out of total steps (e.g., "5/10").
 *
 * @param status The status text to display.
 * @returns void
 */
setProgressStatus(status: string): void

/**
 * Sets the color used by the progress indicator.
 *
 * @param color The color token to apply to the progress UI.
 * @returns void
 */
setProgressColor(color: AXStyleColorType): void

/**
 * Sets the dialog title text.
 *
 * @param text The title text to display at the top of the dialog.
 * @returns void
 */
setDialogTitle(text: string): void

/**
 * Sets the numeric progress value.
 *
 * @param value A number in the range 0–100 representing the current progress.
 * @returns void
 */
setProgressValue(value: number): void

/**
 * Opens a loading dialog with the specified configuration.
 *
 * @param options Configuration for the loading dialog, including title, progress mode, and optional initial values.
 * @returns AXDialogRef - A reference with helper methods to control the dialog lifecycle and UI (close, setProgressValue, setProgressText, setDialogTitle, setProgressColor, setProgressStatus).
 */
show(options: AXLoadingDialogConfig): AXDialogRef
